---
title: "Code chunks"
author: "Lucrezia"
affiliation: "Unversity of Trieste"
format: 
  html:
    toc: TRUE
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: TRUE
    grid:   
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme: 
      light: journal
      dark: superhero
self-contained: true
lang: it
bibliography: biblio.bib
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin 
---
